title: Organic farming and EU Policy
subtitle: L’Agriculture biologique et la politique de l’UE
description: A guide summarizing the EU regulation framework and benefits of organic farming under Regulation 2018/848, focusing on its role in biodiversity enhancement, pollinator protection, and harmonized standards. It outlines the growth of organic land in the EU and calls for Member States to develop national strategies with clear actions, incentives, deadlines, and targets to support pesticide reduction and the Farm to Fork and Biodiversity Strategy goals.
